room.caption: [NH7] The Room

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=64 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateH_3 newArrowPosX=-8 x+=8

noteType=14 noteToRead="Claire,
Don't you lie to me you little bitch! I know where you go. I know who you've been bringing here.
You can stay in your room until you learn respect! I will be back for you later."
